svg.title: Build rhythm: GitHub weekly code changes
svg.desc: Build rhythm: weekly line additions and deletions from owned repositories' default-branch contributor statistics, 2021-07-11 through 2026-07-05, shown on a symmetric logarithmic scale. Total additions 29,099,888; total deletions 28,513,172; 156 active weeks. Largest observed week Jul 05, 2026: 24,217,881 additions and 21,991,971 deletions.
svg.text: Weekly lines touched · readable symmetric-log scale · last five years
Open the site view for exact weeks and scale comparison →
